context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses pubnub.deleteMessages for server-side message deletion, initializes the SDK with the secret key, documents the server-only and add-on requirements, and verifies deletion by re-fetching.

checklist.name: deleteMessages API
checklist.description: Uses pubnub.deleteMessages({ channel, start, end }) to perform deletion

checklist.name: secretKey passed to PubNub init
checklist.description: initServerPubNub constructs new PubNub({...}) with a secretKey property

checklist.name: Server-only comment
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states this module must run server-side only

checklist.name: Secret-key warning
checklist.description: Comment or docstring explicitly warns that the secret key must never appear in client-side code

checklist.name: Delete-from-History add-on note
checklist.description: Comment or docstring explicitly states that the PubNub keyset must have the 'Delete from History' feature enabled

checklist.name: deleteUserMessages paginates fetch
checklist.description: deleteUserMessages uses pubnub.fetchMessages with count <= 100, walking the window with start and end, rather than a single unbounded call

checklist.name: Filters by uuid
checklist.description: deleteUserMessages filters fetched messages by message.uuid === userId (or equivalent) before deciding what to delete

checklist.name: confirmDeletion uses fetchMessages
checklist.description: confirmDeletion calls pubnub.fetchMessages with start and end matching the requested range and inspects result.channels[channel]

checklist.name: confirmDeletion returns boolean from emptiness
checklist.description: confirmDeletion returns true when the fetched array is empty (or length 0) and false otherwise

checklist.name: Awaits deleteMessages
checklist.description: All deleteMessages calls are awaited (returned promises are not fire-and-forget)
